summary: Set 7 Session 1: landed the writers (synthesize_not_started_state, backfill_session_state_files, the python -m ai_router.backfill_session_state CLI). Added 21 tests. Ran the backfill on this repo, which synthesized session-state.json for sets 007/008/009 (sets 001-006 were preserved untouched). Cross-provider verification VERIFIED after a fix-issues round (return-type contract, missing test, atomic-write race).

reason.specifics: Session 1 landed cleanly with VERIFIED on round 2; the same orchestrator is well-positioned to drive Session 2 (reader collapses) with full context on the writers and the lazy-synth fallback path.
